description.ko: 빛과 물질을 모두 삼켜버리는 VOID-3 현상이 미지로 향하는 잊히지 않을 만큼 아름다운 관문을 만들어내는 우주의 가장 깊은 곳으로 떠나는 시각적 여정입니다.
description.en: A visual journey into the furthest depths of the universe, where the VOID-3 phenomenon consumes light and matter alike, creating a hauntingly beautiful gateway to the unknown.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 anomaly in the deep cosmos, a massive swirling vortex of obsidian dark matter, edges glowing with faint bioluminescent violet and neon cyan, distant dying stars being pulled into the gravity well, cosmic dust clouds, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal and haunting atmosphere, volumetric lighting.
